$comment: Cross-state pay summary for state DDS examiners and first-line supervisors. Peer set is the same population-peer group used in docs/peer-states-comparison.json (states within ~6-8M population). All annual figures are USD. Data quality varies — see 'data_quality' field per state. Supervisor figure for MA is from CTHRU actual-paid 2023 (Chief VDE chart-rate equivalent not yet extracted into pay-scales/); peer states are scheduled/contracted rates from official PDFs.

tier1_bls_oews.reason: BLS HTML 403's WebFetch + curl; Wayback rate-limited (429); firecrawl out of credits. Need api.bls.gov registered key for series-ID pull.
tier1_bls_oews.fallback: Per-state class-spec data below carries the bargaining-table value without BLS.

MA.agency: MRC (Massachusetts Rehabilitation Commission), Disability Determination Services

examiner.title: Vocational Disability Examiner I/II/III (VDE)
examiner.notes: Step 1 Grade 20 → Step 12 Grade 23 (FY2027). Bi-weekly chart-rate × 26.

supervisor.title: Chief Vocational Disability Examiner / VDE IV
supervisor.scheduled_rate_source: CTHRU actual-paid CY 2023 (chart-rate not yet extracted)
supervisor.notes: n=16 in CTHRU 2023; pre-July-2024 contract increase. Update to scheduled rate is a follow-up data task.

MD.agency: Maryland State Department of Education (MSDE), DORS, Disability Determination Services Branch

examiner.title: Disability Claims Examiner I
examiner.scheduled_rate_source: MD DBM Standard Salary Schedule effective 2025-07-01

supervisor.title: Disability Claims Examiner Supervisor
supervisor.scheduled_rate_source: MD DBM Standard Salary Schedule effective 2025-07-01

MD.bargaining_status: AFSCME representation; supervisor is in AFSCME Maryland Supervisors Union (Unit S)

VA.agency: Virginia Department for Aging and Rehabilitative Services (DARS), Disability Determination Services

examiner.title: DDS Analyst — Trainee 1 / Journey / Junior
examiner.scheduled_rate_source: DHRM Classified Salary Structure effective 2025-06-10 + DARS DDS internal salary model
examiner.notes: VA pay bands are wide; 'starting salary' rows are the actual hiring rate. NoVA area pays meaningfully higher max.

VA.bargaining_status: no collective bargaining for VA state employees

WA.agency: Washington Department of Social and Health Services (DSHS), Division of Disability Determination Services (DDDS)

examiner.title: DDS Adjudicator 1 / 2 / 3
examiner.scheduled_rate_source: OFM General Service Salary Schedule (Represented) effective 2025-07-01
examiner.notes: Adj 1 Range 46: $49,428–$66,372. Adj 2 Range 52: $57,252–$76,968. Adj 3 Range 56: $63,252–$84,984. Step M is a premium step.

supervisor.title: DDS Adjudicator 5 (lead/expert)
supervisor.pay_grades: Salary Range — manual lookup needed; Range 62 candidate
supervisor.scheduled_rate_source: OFM General Service Salary Schedule effective 2025-07-01
supervisor.notes: Class 953 → range mapping not directly verified; OFM class-spec page URL has rotted. Range 62 is the most common assignment for this tier in OFM data.

WA.bargaining_status: WFSE General Government CBA 2025-27 (3% 2025, 2% 2026); supervisors covered, not WMS-excluded
WA.data_quality: high for examiner; supervisor pay range needs class-to-range confirmation

WI.agency: Wisconsin Department of Health Services (DHS), Disability Determination Bureau (DDB)

examiner.title: Disability Determination Specialist
examiner.pay_grades: TBD — class code located in 2025-27 Comp Plan but pay-range cross-walk not extracted
examiner.estimate_source: ZipRecruiter market-rate (Apr 2026); scheduled rate is a follow-up gap

WI.bargaining_status: non-represented post-Wisconsin Act 10 (2011); compensation set legislatively, not bargained
WI.data_quality: low — class codes confirmed, scheduled rates not extractable from cached PDF

TN.agency: Tennessee Department of Human Services (TDHS), Division of Rehabilitation Services, Disability Determination Services

examiner.title: Disability Claims Examiner
examiner.pay_grades: TN AlphaCompPlan PDF — not extractable in this session

TN.bargaining_status: right-to-work; no collective bargaining for state employees

AZ.agency: Arizona Department of Economic Security (DES), Disability Determination Services Administration

examiner.title: Disability Determination Specialist
examiner.scheduled_rate_source: ADOA HR salary schedules; class spec database not accessible
examiner.estimate_caveat: Glassdoor aggregate; one confirmed data point at $65,885 average

AZ.bargaining_status: no collective bargaining; merit system under Arizona State Personnel System (ASPS)

IN.agency: Indiana Family and Social Services Administration (FSSA), Disability Determination Bureau (DDB)

examiner.title: Disability Claims Adjudicator
examiner.scheduled_rate_source: WorkforIndiana job postings + private salary databases

IN.bargaining_status: non-union; Indiana ended state-employee collective bargaining in 2005 (Executive Order 15-13)

MO.agency: Missouri Department of Elementary and Secondary Education (DESE), Office of Adult Learning and Rehabilitation Services

examiner.title: not located in public OA classification database
examiner.scheduled_rate_source: DESE internal classification; not publicly indexed
related_classifications: MO OA #0866 Disability Program Representative — Grade 06 ($36,360–$57,792, Governor's Council on Disability, NOT DESE DDS)
MO OA #0868 Disability Program Specialist — Grade 07 ($41,208–$65,544, Governor's Council on Disability, NOT DESE DDS)

MO.bargaining_status: limited state-employee bargaining; specifics out of scope
MO.data_quality: very low — class title not located in public records

high_quality_observations: MA examiner peak (VDE III max, $115,429) is the highest in the high-quality peer group except MD supervisor max ($133,951).
MA examiner entry (VDE I step 1, $73,555) is higher than MD examiner entry ($62,220) and roughly tied with WA examiner peak (Adj 3 max, $84,984) — note: comparing entry vs. peak across grades.
VA pay bands are extremely wide and most useful via 'starting salary' DDS-internal rates ($54k Trainee → $105k Supervisor).

follow_up_data_gaps: BLS OEWS SOC 43-4061 cross-state benchmark (api.bls.gov registered key)
MA Chief VDE chart-rate equivalent (currently using CTHRU 2023 actual-paid)
WA class 953 → salary range mapping (likely Range 62 but unconfirmed)
WI class 49201/49220 → pay range mapping (encoded PDF)
TN/AZ/IN/MO authoritative scheduled rates (require state HR direct contact or alternate document sourcing)
